name: Bunnysuit 2B
description:
The machine threat has largely been destroyed, and now the androids of YoRHa have been retrofitted to serve mankind through other means. Humanities numbers remain dangerously low and the once powerful androids have now been altered to not only protect humanity through martial means, but also through pleasure and reproduction. All of this is facilitated through the YoRHa Millennium Casino where the androids serve humanity. Both a place of leisure and pleasure, it serves to introduce humans to androids that they may claim as their own. 

2B has been recently retrofitted and has been appropriately equipped for her new task. She also happens to be one of the few androids that really stand out to you. Time for the both of you to do your duty to humanity, hopefully there won't be any bumps along the way.

**----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------**

**Creator Notes**

This is basically straight smut with images that should be shown in responses.

Another bot for my short reemergence before I disappear into the busy days of April. In my last bot I talked about one more I had in the works that I was going to release in early April, this is not it. I made this one because I had a bunch of ideas flowing, and I wanted to put them down before they inevitably vanished. Though I enjoyed this bot enough that I actually managed to finish it instead of just putting it in my to do list. The bot I am reworking for early April is a mix of a more serious bot with smut. The original one is pretty dark so I decided to release another that had a bit of a different tone, so you'll get two final bots instead of one! The first of the two will be released sometime in early April. After those two bots it will probably be awhile before I make another one because of my job, but don't worry, just like with my last absence I will be back! Although this next absence might be a few months long.

Please leave a review to let me know what you thought of the bot!

**----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------**

**Credits for images used**

Portrait and images used were created by Floox

**----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------**

**Troubleshooting**

If you are having any issues with the bot please take a look at my tips & tricks/troubleshooting section on my profile page. If you are still having issues after going through it please let me know! I need to know how to recreate any issues so I can fix them.

While this was created with OpenAI in mind this bot is not as complicated as some of my other ones, so JJLM can be used. However, with that being said I have not extensively tested this bot with JLLM, so it could still have some issues with that API.
